Off Calendar Oct-22-2014 Continued To Jan-13-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 503
MINI MINUTES:
Plaintiffs' motion to compel Defendant Kaiser Gypsum Company, Inc.'s further responses to Plaintiff's request for production of documents and special interrogatories; request for sanctions.

APPEARANCES: Gilbert L. Purcell, Esq. of Brayton Purcell LLP 415/898-1555 for pltfs & moving parties; Jennifer Judin, Esq. of DeHay Elliston LLP 510/285-0750 for deft & opposing party.

RULING: Hearing held. The Court set an informal discovery meeting with the parties in an effort to resolve the issues for 12/03/14 at 2:00pm.
